_note: gem -> { attr, sources }. attr computes the socket colour (str=red, dex=green, int=blue) and is hand-curated - a gem missing here renders a neutral pip with '?'. sources (per-class quest/vendor availability) are FILLED AUTOMATICALLY from the Path of Exile Wiki by the 'Fetch gem data' workflow (or npm run fetch-gems) - re-run it after a game patch to refresh. Hand edits to sources of wiki-known gems will be overwritten by the next fetch; attrs and extra gems are preserved. Shape: { "kind": "quest"|"vendor", "act": 1, "quest": "...", "npc": "Nessa", "classes": ["Witch"] } (classes omitted = all). The engine picks the earliest source per class (quest before vendor); known gems with no source fall back to Siosa/Lilly.
